productDisplayName: Fila Men Vendata Black Casual Shoes
description: The fila Vendata shoe is fila's reinterpretation of the classic sport shoe into a casual shoe. Contrasting two-tone upper make this shoe a love-forever classic. Low at the ankle with high cut at the lace-ups, wear this with off-duty staples to give them a fresh twist. UpperSynthetic upper upper for lightweight comfort and absolute breathabilitySynthetic overlays strategically placed for added shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded and meshed tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortPadded mesh inner for breathable comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the midfoot region for abrasion free comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleHerringbone patterned outsole with a suction point at the big toe regionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
